---
title: "Sarah Mary Spratt"
---

## Sarah Mary Spratt

**Dates:** (1798-1876)

**Maiden name:** (Sellwood)

### Description

mother of William and of Harriet Spratt

### Biography

[information from Barrie Spratt]

### Letters

- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
